'''The Battle of Bespin''' in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] was part of the [[Empire Reborn]] campaign.

==Background==
It occurred after [[Kyle Katarn]] went to [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] after linking up with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] at [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. Calrissian told Katarn of [[Imperial Remnant|Remnant]] activity in Cloud City, as well as being overrun by [[Reelo Baruk]]'s mercenaries. After contacting the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for help, Calrissian dropped off Katarn on Cloud City's [[reactor stalk]], allowing the Jedi to infiltrate the [[Industrial Levels|undercity]] from below. Meanwhile Calrissian gathered some old friends from the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|security force]] to come Katarn's way from the upper levels.

==The battle==
It was then, somewhere in the [[Cloud City Core]] where [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] had once [[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|dueled]] with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], that Katarn encountered a strange being: a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] called a [[Reborn]], whom Katarn dueled and killed. Using Calrissian's [[R5-series astromech droid]], he soon gained access to the city streets.

[[File:Batbes1.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Wing Guard]] during the battle.]]
Linking up with the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Wing Guards]], Katarn first destroyed all of Reelo's thugs in the lower levels and then forced all Remnant forces out of the city. [[Tavion Axmis]], [[Desann]]'s apprentice, engaged Katarn in a duel. Katarn emerged victorious, and [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force-gripped]] Axmis, ready to kill her. Whimpering with fear, she revealed to him that [[Jan Ors]], who was believed dead, was alive on the ''[[Doomgiver]]'' and begged him to let her go. He spared her life and boarded a carrier to go to the [[Cairn Installation]].

==Behind the scenes==
The battle appears in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''.
